scripts.build: yarn workspace @remoola/database-2 run db:generate && turbo run build
scripts.schema:check: yarn workspace @remoola/database-2 run db:generate && yarn workspace @remoola/database-2 run db:validate && yarn workspace @remoola/api-types run build && yarn workspace @remoola/api-types run typecheck && yarn workspace @remoola/api-v2 run typecheck && yarn workspace @remoola/admin-v2 run typecheck
scripts.knip: sh -c 'knip --no-config-hints; code=$?; if [ "$code" -eq 1 ]; then exit 0; fi; exit "$code"'
scripts.knip:full: sh -c 'knip --no-config-hints --include exports,types,duplicates --reporter compact; code=$?; if [ "$code" -eq 1 ]; then exit 0; fi; exit "$code"'
scripts.knip:admin-v2: sh -c 'knip --no-config-hints --workspace apps/admin-v2 --reporter compact; code=$?; if [ "$code" -eq 1 ]; then exit 0; fi; exit "$code"'
scripts.knip:consumer-css-grid: sh -c 'knip --no-config-hints --workspace apps/consumer-css-grid --reporter compact; code=$?; if [ "$code" -eq 1 ]; then exit 0; fi; exit "$code"'
scripts.knip:api-v2: sh -c 'knip --no-config-hints --workspace apps/api-v2 --reporter compact; code=$?; if [ "$code" -eq 1 ]; then exit 0; fi; exit "$code"'
scripts.knip:api-types: sh -c 'knip --no-config-hints --workspace packages/api-types --reporter compact; code=$?; if [ "$code" -eq 1 ]; then exit 0; fi; exit "$code"'
scripts.typecheck:v2-apps: yarn workspace @remoola/consumer-css-grid run typecheck && yarn workspace @remoola/admin-v2 run typecheck && yarn workspace @remoola/api-v2 run typecheck
scripts.verify:prisma-format: yarn workspace @remoola/database-2 prisma format && git diff --exit-code packages/database-2/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.test: TERM=dumb NO_COLOR=1 node ./scripts/ensure-local-development.js root:test && turbo run test
scripts.test:e2e: TERM=dumb NO_COLOR=1 node ./scripts/ensure-local-development.js root:test:e2e && node ./scripts/cleanup-stale-test-dbs.js && turbo run test:e2e
scripts.test:e2e:fast: TERM=dumb NO_COLOR=1 node ./scripts/ensure-local-development.js root:test:e2e:fast && node ./scripts/cleanup-stale-test-dbs.js && turbo run test:e2e:fast
scripts.test:v2-apps: yarn workspace @remoola/consumer-css-grid run test && yarn workspace @remoola/admin-v2 run test && yarn workspace @remoola/api-v2 run test && yarn workspace @remoola/api-v2 run test:e2e
scripts.verify:v2-apps: yarn build:vercel-guard && yarn typecheck:v2-apps && yarn test:v2-apps
scripts.lint:fix:apps: yarn lint:fix:api-v2 && yarn lint:fix:admin-v2 && yarn lint:fix:consumer-css-grid
scripts.lint:fix:v2-apps: yarn lint:fix:api-v2 && yarn lint:fix:admin-v2 && yarn lint:fix:consumer-css-grid
